description: Rewrite NgepetViewModel.kt with comprehensive state management to handle all game phases: lobby browsing, match creation (host), joining (intruder), active match room with role-based actions, avatar selection, leaderboards, and history. Use a phase-based approach similar to TarotViewModel/TarotPhase pattern.
steps: Create an enum NgepetPhase with states: LOBBY, CREATE_MATCH, JOIN_MATCH, MATCH_ROOM, AVATAR_SHOP, LEADERBOARD, HISTORY. The MATCH_ROOM phase handles both host and intruder sub-states internally.

Define NgepetUiState data class with fields: isLoading:Boolean, phase:NgepetPhase, matches:List<NgepetLobbyMatch>, activeMatch:NgepetActiveMatchData?, matchDetail:NgepetMatchDetailWrapper? (the full show response), ownedAvatars:List<NgepetOwnedAvatarItem>, avatarShop:List<NgepetAvatar>, history:List<NgepetHistoryItem>, leaderboard:List<Any> (generic for different boards), leaderboardType:String, currentRole:String? (host/intruder), guessResult:NgepetGuessResponse?, message:String?, error:String?. Add sub-fields for create form state (hostName, difficulty, duration, maxIntruders, tokenPool, minToken, maxToken, selectedHouseAvatarId) and join form state (intruderName, tokenAmount, selectedPlayerAvatarId).

Implement ViewModel functions: loadMatches() - fetches lobby list, checkActiveMatch() - checks if user has active match and auto-navigates to MATCH_ROOM, loadMatchDetail(matchId:String) - fetches full match detail, createMatch() - validates form fields and calls API with NgepetCreateMatchRequest then transitions to MATCH_ROOM, joinMatch(matchId:String) - calls join API then transitions to MATCH_ROOM, submitChoice(matchId:String, itemName:String) - intruder picks item, hostGuess(matchId:String, intruderId:String, itemName:String) - host guesses intruder location, hideToken(matchId:String, itemName:String) - host hides token in item, intruderGuessHidden(matchId:String, intruderId:String, itemName:String) - intruder guesses hidden token, closeMatch(matchId:String) - host closes match, claimVictory(intruderId:String) - intruder claims victory, refreshMatchDetail() - polls current match state.
Implement avatar functions: loadAvatarShop(), buyAvatar(id:Int), loadOwnedAvatars(), equipAvatar(id:Int). Implement leaderboard/history: loadLeaderboard(type:String), loadHistory().

Add navigation helper functions: goToPhase(phase:NgepetPhase), goBack() with logic to return to appropriate previous screen, clearError(), clearMessage(). On initialization, call checkActiveMatch() to auto-resume if user has an active match.
Keep the ViewModelProvider.Factory pattern used by other ViewModels in the project. The Factory takes GamesRepository as parameter.
acceptance_criteria: NgepetViewModel compiles with all functions defined
State transitions between phases work logically (lobby -> create/join -> match_room)
Active match check on init auto-navigates to match room if user has active match
All API calls use the GamesRepository methods from FEAT-001
verification: Run: export JAVA_HOME=/root/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2 && export PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/Mobile-Apps/MysticNusa && ./gradlew assembleDebug
findings: Build verified with assembleDebug. NgepetPhase enum is defined in viewmodels package; the screen still has its own local NgepetPhase enum (LOBBY, CHOOSE_ITEM, WAITING, RESULT) which will be replaced in FEAT-003. Fixed NgepetGameScreen submitChoice call to use new single-arg signature (matchId is now internal to ViewModel state).
